**Acrolein fukui reactivity descriptor (most electrophilic site)** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitted [RIJK]) in PySCF, gas phase (no implicit solvent), charge 0, multiplicity 1. Mulliken charges (PySCF) were used to compute the finite-difference Fukui indices. SCF converged for all states. Most electrophilic atom: C4 (C at atom index 3) with fukui⁺ = 0.64232102.
